narrative:
Fairland Local Sd school district has 259 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 37.5 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -23.8% D−R vs -37.6% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
